title: Bright Ideas Fluorescent Flashes. Flash Size: A5 Approx 14.8cm x 21cm, Pack of 50 Assorted Colours. Ideal for Eye-catching Shop Retail and Price Signs. BI8005.
features: Bright Ideas pack of 50 A5 Fluorescent flashes are supplied assorted flat and heat sealed in a clear plastic film for protection from dust and moisture – Please note that product colour may slightly vary due to photographic lighting sourcing
Each Flash card measures A5 approx. 148 x 210 mm in size with enough space for you to write some price or product information to attraction your customers with these big bright and bold flash cards

Colours are bright neon fluorescent, and you get x 10 of the following 5 colours, Yellow, Orange, Pink, Green and Red. Made from a wearable paper which is safe and long lasting. Nice smooth surface for writing on

These fluorescent neon card flashes can be widely applied to display price and sale information in many places, such as small shops, supermarkets, clothing shops, local market stalls, outdoors and indoors, also suitable as name tags for classroom

Bright Ideas has a wide range of assorted packs and sizes of fluorescent flashes and cards across are range, suitable for display cabinets, doors and window displays – let your customers know about your sales
description: From the manufacturer Bright Ideas Crafts - Arts and Crafts Supplier Our Story Bright Ideas is a well-established and successful arts and crafts supplier founded in 1995 in Suffolk, England. We specialise in devising and sourcing great quality arts and crafts products globally for sale in the craft and educational market. We have an extensive range of Arts and Crafts products and our product range is constantly growing. Products are available at affordable prices across our complete range with exciting items available for: Arts & Craft Christmas Education - particularly Primary Education Products in our range include: Border Rolls - available in a range of single colours which also include Gold and Silver Metallic. Also available some super-value multi-packs with assorted colours and in varying pack sizes. Cellophane - single colour rolls in 6 colours including clear and printed cello bags for Christmas and Easter festivities. Tissue and Crepe Paper - tissue paper available on a handy roll in individual colours or as an assorted coloured paper roll. Our Crepe Paper is available in packs of 10 folded sheets - again in assorted individual colour packs or multi-packs of 12 assorted colours. Book Covers and Book Covering Self-Adhesive Film - a range of sizes making them perfect for schools and libraries Arts and Crafts essentials ..... Barrel and Alphabet Beads, Wiggle Eyes, Stems, Buttons, Pom Poms, Jewels, Confetti Sparkles, Glitter, Ribbons, Felt and so much more including some assorted Arts and Crafts Kits. Chalk - pavement chalk, chalk eggs, blackboard chalk and a range of Oil and Soft Pastel chalks. Paper products including metallic paper and card, fluorescent paper, a lovely Rainbow range with paper, card, crepe and tissue and A4 Black card to name a few Calendar Tabs and Calendar Blanks Naturals Range - choose from Acorns, Pine Cones, Branch Off-cuts and Willow Branches. Fluorescent Stars Assorted Sizes The thickness of the flashes are gsm 5 colours in each pack, Bright Green, Yellow, Blue, Pink and Orange Available in 3 sizes 3" (7.6cm), 4" (10cm) and 2.5 x 4" (6.3 x 7.6cm) One sided colour finish, with the reverse side a plain finish Each pack is shrink wrapped in clear plastic with a sticky product label Must Have Fluorescent Stars come in an assortment of colours and sizes and are ideal for using as notices and signs, either by retailers advertising special offers or at home. They are also perfect for students to use as revision cards or for use in arts and crafts lessons in school, these can be used with glue, glitter, paints and many more craft items and accessories.
